caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, with clothing racks and mannequins visible in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally closing his eyes and speaking into the microphone, suggesting he is either narrating a story or responding to questions. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a podcast recording session.
